section.div: A unified metric and framework for evaluating the efficiency (Cost/Time vs. Quality) of nodes in LangChain & LangGraph workflows.
AI-powered tool that evaluates candidate CVs against job requirements, providing a clear match score and insights for faster, smarter hiring decisions.
A conversational AI agent built with Python, LangChain, and Google's Gemini API. This project explores advanced features like memory, tools, and a structured Git workflow.
